title: Madurai、Tamil Nadu — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Madurai、Tamil Nadu的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Madurai是Tamil Nadu的一個城市，人口約1,500,000。One of the oldest continuously inhabited cities in the world, known for the magnificent Meenakshi Amman Temple and Tamil culture.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
